summary: Iteration 53 - Tested region/country selector fixes and AI Assistant language features. All features working correctly: country selector persists after page reload for guests, currency auto-changes with country (ES=EUR, US=USD, GB=GBP), AI greeting displays in user's selected language, and header navigation shows translated text (not raw keys).

COUNTRY SELECTOR (Guest): Currency auto-changes to USD when US selected - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR (Guest): Country persists after page reload - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR (Guest): Currency persists after page reload - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR (Guest): Select GB → Currency changes to GBP - PASS
COUNTRY SELECTOR (Logged-in): Country changes successfully - PASS

AI GREETING (Spanish): Shows '¡Hola! Soy Hispalo AI...' - PASS
AI GREETING (German): Shows 'Hallo! Ich bin Hispalo AI...' - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: LocaleContext.js: localStorage persistence for country/currency working correctly (lines 25-33, 189-218)
LocaleSelector.js: Cart validation only called for logged-in users (lines 97-123)
AIAssistant.js: Greeting language effects working correctly (lines 345-410)
de.json: All header keys present and translated correctly
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user for logged-in user testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 verified all region/country selector and AI language features are working. Key fixes from main agent: 1) localStorage persistence for country/currency for guests, 2) Cart validation API only called when user is logged in, 3) AI greeting useEffects to show greeting when chat opens and update when language changes, 4) German translations added for header keys. All features passed testing.
features_tested: Country/Region selector for guests - persistence after page reload
Currency auto-changes when country changes (ES=EUR, US=USD, GB=GBP)
Hispalo AI greeting in user's selected language (Spanish, English, French, German)
AI greeting updates when user changes language
Header navigation shows translated text (not raw keys)
